name: spin-payment7-service
description: TypeScript WASM payment service with Dapr sidecar - state store & service invocation

scripts.build: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://spin-payment7-service.localhost -o dist/spin-payment7-service.wasm
scripts.build:debug: node build.mjs && mkdirp dist && j2w -d -i build/bundle.js --initLocation http://spin-payment7-service.localhost -o dist/spin-payment7-service.wasm
